Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx basic,$0801,$ffff "OYUP-3E03" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Oy Up! (Arlasoft - 2020).prg"
Metadata.Notes: NOP'd out JSRs at $363C and $3E15 to remove highscore loading and saving to disk.
